header_text: Not a lot of likes: Feelings

elements.text:
You decide to reply all to a department-wide email to share an idea. It's been a few hours and no one has responded to your suggestion yet. 

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I feel happy to be trying new things.
I'm frustrated that no one responded to my email, but then I remember that it's only been a few hours.
I feel disappointed not many people liked my idea, but they must just have different perspectives than me.
I feel really proud of my idea.
